tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Initialize monorepo with Vite+React+TS frontend and Express+TS backend.

**Files:** package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, server/tsconfig.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, index.html, .gitignore, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js, src/index.css, server/index.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run dev starts Vite on 5173
- npm run server starts Express on 3001 with /healthz
- TypeScript zero errors
- Tailwind applies

**Verify:** `curl http://localhost:3001/healthz` → `{"ok":true}`

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","vite.config.ts","tsconfig.json","server/tsconfig.json","src/main.tsx","src/App.tsx","index.html",".gitignore","tailwind.config.js","postcss.config.js","src/index.css","server/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"curl http://localhost:3001/healthz","acceptanceCriteria":["npm run dev starts Vite on 5173","npm run server starts Express on 3001 with /healthz","TypeScript zero errors","Tailwind applies"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Database Schema + Song API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SQLite schema + Express routes for songs (upload, list, favorite, delete).

**Files:** server/db.ts, server/routes/songs.ts, server/index.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- POST /api/songs/upload returns {id,title,filename}
- GET /api/songs returns array
- PATCH /api/songs/:id/favorite toggles
- DELETE /api/songs/:id removes row and file

**Verify:** `curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/songs`

```json:metadata
{"files":["server/db.ts","server/routes/songs.ts","server/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/songs","acceptanceCriteria":["POST /api/songs/upload returns {id,title,filename}","GET /api/songs returns array","PATCH /api/songs/:id/favorite toggles","DELETE /api/songs/:id removes row and file"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Progress API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Express routes to get/upsert progress per song.

**Files:** server/routes/progress.ts, server/index.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /api/progress/:songId returns row or default
- PUT /api/progress/:songId upserts
- 404 for missing songId

**Verify:** `curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/progress/1`

```json:metadata
{"files":["server/routes/progress.ts","server/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/progress/1","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /api/progress/:songId returns row or default","PUT /api/progress/:songId upserts","404 for missing songId"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Shared Types + API Client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TypeScript interfaces and typed fetch wrappers.

**Files:** src/types.ts, src/api.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- types.ts exports Song, Progress, ProgressStatus
- api.ts exports getSongs, uploadSong, toggleFavorite, deleteSong, getProgress, upsertProgress
- tsc --noEmit passes

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/types.ts","src/api.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["types.ts exports Song, Progress, ProgressStatus","api.ts exports all 6 functions","tsc --noEmit passes"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Library Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Library page with song list, search/filter, favorite toggle, delete, upload zone.

**Files:** src/components/Library/LibraryPage.tsx, src/components/Library/SongCard.tsx, src/components/Library/UploadZone.tsx, src/App.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Song list renders
- Search filters by title
- Favorites toggle works
- Upload refreshes list
- Delete with confirmation
- Song title navigates to /viewer/:id

**Verify:** Manual test

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/Library/LibraryPage.tsx","src/components/Library/SongCard.tsx","src/components/Library/UploadZone.tsx","src/App.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Song list renders","Search filters by title","Favorites toggle works","Upload refreshes list","Delete with confirmation","Song title navigates to /viewer/:id"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AlphaTab Wrapper + Song Viewer Shell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Viewer page with alphaTab rendering, play/pause/stop, speed control.

**Files:** src/components/Viewer/AlphaTabWrapper.tsx, src/hooks/useAlphaTab.ts, src/components/Viewer/PlaybackControls.tsx, src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx, src/App.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Score renders in browser
- Play/Pause/Stop work
- Speed 50/75/100% adjusts tempo
- Loading state shown

**Verify:** Manual test with real GP5 file

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/Viewer/AlphaTabWrapper.tsx","src/hooks/useAlphaTab.ts","src/components/Viewer/PlaybackControls.tsx","src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx","src/App.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Score renders in browser","Play/Pause/Stop work","Speed 50/75/100% adjusts tempo","Loading state shown"],"modelTier":"frontier"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Metronome
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Web Audio API metronome synced to score BPM.

**Files:** src/components/Viewer/Metronome.tsx, src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Click audible when enabled
- BPM synced to score tempo
- Works independent of playback
- AudioContext closed on unmount

**Verify:** Manual audio test

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/Viewer/Metronome.tsx","src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Click audible when enabled","BPM synced to score tempo","Works independent of playback","AudioContext closed on unmount"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Loop Control
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bar range loop with start/end inputs and enable toggle.

**Files:** src/components/Viewer/LoopControl.tsx, src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Bar range inputs visible
- Loop enable sets playbackRange ticks
- Loop disable clears playbackRange
- Inputs disabled when score not loaded

**Verify:** Manual loop test

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/Viewer/LoopControl.tsx","src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Bar range inputs visible","Loop enable sets playbackRange ticks","Loop disable clears playbackRange","Inputs disabled when score not loaded"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Section Jumper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Section dropdown to seek to named sections in the score.

**Files:** src/components/Viewer/SectionJumper.tsx, src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Dropdown visible with ≥1 section
- Hidden with no sections
- Selecting section seeks to tick position

**Verify:** Manual test with sectioned GP file

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/Viewer/SectionJumper.tsx","src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Dropdown visible with ≥1 section","Hidden with no sections","Selecting section seeks to tick position"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Progress Panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Side panel for status, BPM, notes, last practiced.

**Files:** src/components/Progress/ProgressPanel.tsx, src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Status dropdown works
- BPM and notes auto-save on blur
- Mark practiced button updates lastPracticed
- Changes persist on page refresh

**Verify:** Manual test: set progress, refresh

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/Progress/ProgressPanel.tsx","src/components/Viewer/ViewerPage.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Status dropdown works","BPM and notes auto-save on blur","Mark practiced button updates lastPracticed","Changes persist on page refresh"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Commit Full Implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single initial commit for all JamLog MVP files.

**Files:** All files.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- git status clean after commit
- Conventional commits format

**Verify:** `git log --oneline -1`
